Login.title: Login
Login.emailNotFound: Email not found in the system. Please ensure you are registered.
Login.otpSendError: Unable to send OTP. Please try again.
Login.otpSendSuccess: OTP sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
Login.otpSendNewSuccess: New OTP sent to your email.
Login.descriptionCredentials: Enter your email to receive a One-Time Password (OTP)
Login.descriptionOtp: Enter the OTP received via email

Register.title: Create an account
Register.description: Enter your details below to register
Register.emailExistsError: This email is already in use. Please go to the login page.
Register.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email inbox to verify your account.

Home.heroDescription: Modern Full-Stack project management system with Kanban, Passwordless Auth, Session Control, and more
Home.featuresDescription: Comprehensive features for task management, from Auth to Drag & Drop Kanban Boards
Home.feature1Desc: Simple and ultimate secure login using Email OTP directly to your inbox.
Home.feature2Desc: Manage tasks with Drag & Drop using @dnd-kit, moving cards seamlessly.
Home.feature3Desc: Write task details and format them fully with WYSIWYG using Tiptap.
Home.feature4Desc: Table view for all tasks along with Archive and Trash storage systems.
Home.feature5Desc: Server-side CRUD operations without needing separate API Endpoints.
Home.feature6Desc: Control all devices logged in. Check and force a logout remotely at any time.
Home.techDescription: Using the best tools in their respective areas for an excellent Developer Experience.
Home.ctaDescription: Sign up for free and start building your Kanban Board today.

KanbanBoard.title: Kanban Board
KanbanBoard.description: Manage and track all task statuses

toast.errorTryAgain: An error occurred, please try again.
toast.hideSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been hidden from the board.
toast.showSuccessDesc: "{title}" will now be shown on the board.
toast.reorderErrorDesc: An error occurred while reordering cards.

KanbanList.title: Task List
KanbanList.description: View and manage all tasks in tabular format

ArchiveList.title: Archive
ArchiveList.description: Archived tasks will be kept here. You can restore them anytime.
ArchiveList.emptyStateDesc: When you archive a task, it will be stored here instead of showing on the Board

actions.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to move "{title}" to trash?

toast.restoreSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been restored to the Board
toast.errorTryAgain: An error occurred, please try again

RecurringList.title: Recurring Tasks
RecurringList.description: Manage automatically created tasks such as monthly or weekly tasks.
RecurringList.emptyStateDesc: Create a recurring task to have the system automatically create tasks on schedule
RecurringList.noResults: No recurring tasks matching the search

actions.deleteDesc: "{title}" will be permanently deleted, but already created tasks will not be affected.

toast.statusActiveDesc: "{title}" will continue creating tasks on schedule
toast.statusPausedDesc: "{title}" will not create tasks until activated again

TrashList.title: Trash
TrashList.description: Deleted tasks will be here. You can restore or permanently delete them.
TrashList.emptyStateDesc: When you delete a task from Board or List, it will be moved here.

actions.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

toast.restoreSuccessDesc: "{title}" has been restored to the Board
toast.errorTryAgain: An error occurred, please try again

TaskDialog.deleteDescription: This task will be moved to the trash. You can restore it later.
